title: New SQLite connection opened and closed on every CRUD call
evidence: app/crud.py:4-8 — each of create/list/get/update/delete calls database.get_connection() then conn.close(); no pooling or shared connection
suggestion: Acceptable at this scale; consider a connection dependency/pool if throughput matters

title: author filter is exact-match only
suggestion: Spec only requires an ?author= filter; exact match satisfies it. Substring/case-insensitive match would be a UX improvement

title: No ISBN format validation
evidence: app/schemas.py:9 — isbn is Optional[str] with no pattern; spec does not require validation

title: Idiomatic score 0.48 (below mid) from scorer
evidence: scores.json idiomatic=0.48 — low relative to peers despite clean layering; code_quality=0.8333, maintainability=0.97
suggestion: Informational; no concrete defect. Raw-sqlite3 style may score lower than ORM idioms on the idiomatic rubric
